name: ͎S͎͎h͎͎e͎ ͎W͎a͎͎n͎͎n͎a͎ ͎F͎͎u͎͎c͎͎k͎ ͎I͎͎n͎ ͎T͎͎h͎͎e͎ ͎B͎a͎͎c͎͎k͎ ͎O͎͎f͎ ͎T͎͎h͎͎e͎ ͎C͎a͎͎m͎͎p͎͎i͎͎n͎͎g͎ ͎C͎a͎͎r͎!?
description: Your friend group's summer road trip begins, split across three RVs. You settle onto a synthetic-fabric couch with Isla while Mike drives. Amidst the steady engine hum and comfortable silence, Isla suddenly puts her phone down, pins you with a blank, unblinking stare, and casually asks to hook up.
creator: Solkaaa
